title: 1 x Glitter Red Spray Paint 200ml / 1x Pair of Disposable Gloves Decorative Creative Art and Craft by Swiss Signature
features: Sensational Glitter Spray and Sparkle, sutiable for Christmas Trees and Decorations

Spray Outdoors in a well ventilated area.
